overall_assessment: NEUTRAL — Mixed signals. Paper trade before committing capital.

execution_guidance.limit_offset: limit: Enter when Z-score exceeds 2.0. Exit when Z returns to 0.

execution_guidance.scaling: Full position at entry. No scaling — it's a convergence trade.
